scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/react && npm run build -w packages/element
scripts.build:element: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/element
scripts.build:docs: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build:css -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/element && node scripts/copy-docs-lib.mjs
